title: Gasparinia mirabilis
taxonomy: Gasparinia mirabilis is a plant species in the family Acanthaceae. It belongs to the genus Gasparinia, which is a group of flowering plants. This plant is native to tropical Africa, specifically in countries such as Mozambique and South Africa. The classification of Gasparinia mirabilis is further categorized as a species within the order Lamiales. The classification of Gasparinia mirabilis is not well-documented, and further research is needed for a more accurate classification.

Some studies suggest that Gasparinia mirabilis may have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which could be beneficial for treating various health conditions.
